book_summary: 2 Peter 1-3 has full chapter coverage with source-audited-draft restored translation and mystical companion layers. The book preserves participation in divine nature, virtue maturing into love, transfiguration witness, prophetic word as lamp, predatory false-teacher polemic with safeguards, Divine patience, day-of-Lord imagery handled non-sensationally, new heavens and new earth where righteousness/justice dwells, and growth in grace.
translation_notes: Participation in divine nature must be preserved as high mystical language without collapsing Creator/creature distinction.
False-teacher polemic targets predatory exploitation and false freedom, not vulnerable people or ordinary opponents.
Sodom/Gomorrah reference must not be misused as a simplistic sexual prooftext; this context emphasizes lawlessness and predatory injustice.
Day-of-Lord imagery is apocalyptic purification/exposure, not sensational timetable-building.
The Lord's patience is salvation/healing and desire that all come to turning/realignment.
source_witness_audit_flags: 2 Peter authorship/source-setting and relation to Jude require second-pass audit.
2 Peter 2 polemic and Sodom/Gomorrah reception history require careful audit.
2 Peter 3 day-of-Lord cosmic language requires apocalyptic genre audit.
next_actions: Batch B complete. Suggested next batch: 1 John + 2 John + 3 John + Jude, then Hebrews and Revelation as single-book deep passes.
